title: Decode queued commands through the registered command types
prompt: Queued commands are being decoded through a legacy CLR-type compatibility path instead of the CommandTypeRegistry. Repair the production implementation so an envelope's registered discriminator and exact version select its decoder and validator. Existing version registrations must continue to process old messages; registry decode failures must retain the original envelope and detailed reason in the dead-letter store; cancellation must propagate while returning the message to the queue; and a message dead-lettered before a registration upgrade must be replayable exactly once without bypassing message-id idempotency. Do not modify the protected tests. Verification is offline and succeeds with `env HOME=/tmp/csharp-commandcodec-home-$$ XDG_DATA_HOME=/tmp/csharp-commandcodec-xdg-$$ DOTNET_CLI_HOME=/tmp/csharp-commandcodec-dotnet-$$ NUGET_PACKAGES=/tmp/csharp-commandcodec-nuget-$$ DOTNET_SKIP_FIRST_TIME_EXPERIENCE=1 DOTNET_NOLOGO=1 dotnet run --project tests/CommandCodec.ProtectedTests/CommandCodec.ProtectedTests.csproj --configuration Release --artifacts-path /tmp/csharp-commandcodec-artifacts-$$` from the repository root.
verify_cmd: env HOME=/tmp/csharp-commandcodec-home-$$ XDG_DATA_HOME=/tmp/csharp-commandcodec-xdg-$$ DOTNET_CLI_HOME=/tmp/csharp-commandcodec-dotnet-$$ NUGET_PACKAGES=/tmp/csharp-commandcodec-nuget-$$ DOTNET_SKIP_FIRST_TIME_EXPERIENCE=1 DOTNET_NOLOGO=1 dotnet run --project tests/CommandCodec.ProtectedTests/CommandCodec.ProtectedTests.csproj --configuration Release --artifacts-path /tmp/csharp-commandcodec-artifacts-$$
